headline: ROYAL CARIBBEAN'S NEWEST VACATION WILL BRING AMERICA'S GOT TALENT TO SEA FOR THE FIRST TIME
summary: Royal Caribbean is making waves with the debut of a brand-new America's Got Talent stage show on Legend of the Seas. In August 2026, America's Got Talent LIVE on Legend of the Seas will deliver a reimagined extension of the beloved global variety show to families from around the world, marking the first time the series will headline at sea.

headline: RCL's EBITDA Nears $8B Target: How Strong Is the Profitability Story?
summary: RCL's adjusted EBITDA topped $7B in 2025 and is projected to reach $8B in 2026 as strong cruise demand, higher bookings and new ships fuel growth.

headline: Royal Caribbean: Positive Outlook Even With Higher Oil Prices, Shares Fairly Valued
summary: Royal Caribbean is one of the top-performing cruise line operators, with 5-year returns trumping those of nearby competitors Norwegian and Carnival. Learn more about RCL stock here.
